title: Pixel Carpet
description: Some carpet features that we wanted to implement into the game.
body:
Pixel Carpet is an extensionfor [Carpet Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) with small, mostly survival-related features and game mechanic changes.
# Carpet Rules
* The list of carpet rules can be found on [Github](https://github.com/PixilareMedia/PixelCarpet#), or in-game with `/carpet list pixel`
* By default, every rule is disabled, but can be enabled with `/carpet <rule name> <value>`

# Full list of rules (1.9):
* `disabledEndPortals`: Removes the ability to enter an End Portal.
* `disabledNetherPortals`: Removes the ability to enter a Nether Portal.
* `moreMobsOnLeads`: Allow Leads to be attached to more mobs.
* `renewableGravel`: Cobbled Deepslate crushed by falling anvils maks Gravel.
* `preventSnowMelting`: Prevents Snow from melting.
* `preventIceMelting`: Prevents Ice from melting.
* `pvpToggle`: Allows players to Opt into PvP on a world.
* `ladderAnywhere`: Allows the ladders to be placed anywhere.
* `moreTillable`: Allows for Podzol & Mycellium to be tilled into Farmland.
* `podzolLeafLitter`: Allows for Podzol to be tilled into Dirt & Leaf Litter.
